headline: Host Hotels & Resorts Named Winner of Nareit’s 2026 Leader in the Light® Award for Operations
summary: BETHESDA, Md., April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST) (the “Company”) has been named the winner of Nareit’s 2026 Leader in the Light® Award for Operations for large cap REITs. This prestigious award recognizes Host’s innovative and responsible approach to design and development, and the measurable impact those efforts have on asset performance. Nareit’s Leader in the Light Awards honor REIT leaders that create value through responsible business practices and
